intents.text: Read the git diff of the last commit to understand recent changes.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: Read `git diff HEAD~` to see the last commit

intents.text: Add backward compatibility only for SD1/SDXL, or implement in base class if it doesn't change current behavior.
Since npz is a zip, read the saved entry as a stream and only decode the array header instead of loading fully.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: read the saved entry in the zip file as a stream and only decode the array header
